title: Minecarts with Wheels
body:
![Minecarts with Wheels Logo](https://ewanhowell.com/assets/images/resourcepacks/minecarts-with-wheels/logo.webp)
## Add working wheels to Minecarts!
[View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/minecarts-with-wheels)




Have you ever thought that the minecarts in Minecraft look too static? Well this is the pack for you! This pack adds working wheels to the minecarts. When the minecart moves, the wheels turn. The faster the minecart goes, the faster they will spin!
